# LeadCove

> LeadCove is a property-owner enrichment tool for working real estate agents. You drop in an address (or a list of addresses) and get back the verified owner's name, every phone number with DNC + TCPA-litigator flags, every email address, and the registered officer when the property is held by an LLC. Operates nationwide across the United States.

We exist to replace the multi-site lookup workflow most agents stitch together across TruePeopleSearch, Spokeo, BeenVerified, WhitePages, and similar consumer-records sites. The single-tab workflow removes the per-lookup paywall friction and surfaces compliance flags (DNC registry, TCPA litigation history) inline so calls go out defensibly.

## Try it without signing up

- [Public property-owner lookup tool](https://leadcove.io/free-lookup.html): Enter any U.S. property address, see the verified owner's name, phones (with DNC flags), and emails returned in seconds. No account required, no charge.

## Core product

- [How it works](https://leadcove.io/#how): Upload a CSV of addresses, every owner gets enriched in the background, results appear in a single dashboard
- [Pricing](https://leadcove.io/#plans): Starter ($29/mo · 15 credits), Pro ($49/mo · 50 credits), Power ($99/mo · 100 credits). 7-day trial available on Starter, no charge today
- [Sign up](https://app.leadcove.io/#signup): Create an account and start the 7-day trial
- [Customer dashboard](https://app.leadcove.io/): The working application

## Compliance + data quality

- DNC registry: every phone number checked against the national Do Not Call list and flagged inline
- TCPA litigators: owners with known TCPA litigation history are surfaced before any contact attempt
- No-data-no-charge: misses don't consume credits
- Sources: county property records anchor the property-to-owner link; verified contact data comes from the same licensed B2B data sources large CRMs use
